title: 第2節　並木の外側
chapterTitle: 第2章　桜の折り返し
continuityNotes: This is the Sera-side second section of the same blossom-tunnel incident as scene-002-001-001-sato.
Keep the same curved path, same blossom canopy, and same petal flow as the paired image.
Sato must remain an unaware background runner on the path and must keep his gaze along the route rather than toward the incident.
prompt: Create one vertical smartphone-friendly scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第2章　桜の折り返し / 第1話　朝のリズムが整う. Scene focus: 第2節　並木の外側 / セラパート. Summary: そのカーブの外側では、若い夫婦を装った男女が空のベビーカーを使って遊歩道の幅を絞っていた。片方が前輪をわざと流し、もう片方が助け起こすふりで標的の進路を塞ぐ。その足元には低い位… Key beats: そのカーブの外側では、若い夫婦を装った男女が空のベビーカーを使って遊歩道の幅を絞っていた。片方が前輪をわざと流し、もう片方が助け起こすふりで標的の進路を塞ぐ。その足元には低い位置へ細いワイヤー。引っかけて転ばせた相手へブランケットを被せ、そのまま河川管理用の切り欠きへ引き込むつもりだった。花びらの舞う朝なら、慌ただしい家族連れにしか見えない算段らしい。 セラは並木の外側の芝地を使って、先にワイヤーの位置を横から拾った。メイド風ジョギングウェアの裾が枝へ触れない角度で体を入れ、猫耳カチューシャ型の警護支援ユニットに載る雑音だけを削る。サトーの足音は、数秒後にはこのカーブへ入る。 「家族ごっこで道を塞がないでください」 まずベビーカーの前輪へつま先を差し込み、支点だけをずらした。空車は倒れず、進路だけが外れる。男性役がブランケットを広げた瞬間には、セラの手首がその端を巻き取り、喉元ではなく肩口へ締め込んだ。女性役がワイヤーを引いたタイミングで、逆に引き返された張力が手首を打つ。二人は声を上げる前に芝の陰へ沈み、ワイヤーも布も、遠目にはただ風で乱れたようにしか見えなくなった。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear. sera-jogging: セラ. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sera-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: This is the Sera-side second section of the same blossom-tunnel incident as scene-002-001-001-sato. Keep the same curved path, same blossom canopy, and same petal flow as the paired image. Sato must remain an unaware background runner on the path and must keep his gaze along the route rather than toward the incident. In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Create a covert path-protection action image with Sera dominant under the blossom canopy, stopping a fake family setup involving an empty stroller, a low wire trap, and a blanket meant to drag Sato off the path. Keep Sato smaller in the background, still running and unaware.
